title: Shogun Kurozane — Unarmored and Oni Armor
productionStatus: review source; not a pixel-authored runtime asset

creativeBrief.subject: The same sad, elderly Japanese vampire ruler shown without armor and inside original fictional Oni armor.
creativeBrief.characterRead: Intelligent, exhausted, formidable, culpable, and nearly unable to imagine himself apart from the office he made indispensable.
creativeBrief.unarmoredRead: Lean and slightly stooped in repaired black, charcoal, and faded-plum court robes, one hand resting on a closed administrative seal case.
creativeBrief.armoredRead: Upright inside asymmetrical black-lacquer government machinery: stepped mantle plates, broken registry-tablet geometry, bell bronze, and a narrow red central seam.
creativeBrief.identityLock: Long narrow aged face, hollow cheekbones, tired wine-red eyes, swept-back iron-gray hair, short gray moustache, and pointed chin beard remain consistent between states.
constraints: No real clan mon or authentic imperial chrysanthemum
No copied armor or identifiable ceremonial, sacred, theatrical, or historical mask
No absolution, glamour pose, wings, throne, gore, text, logo, or watermark

visualReferences.role: existing Kurozane bottom-row silhouette and palette language only

nextProductionStep: Approve the character identity and armor language, then derive separately authored portrait expressions and deterministic sprite studies.
